Id1.text: Alan Bean was under commander David Scott on Nasa's Apollo 12 mission.

Id2.text: Alan Bean was a member of the NASA operated Apollo 12 crew commanded by David Scott.

Id3.text: David Scott was the commander of the NASA operated Apollo 12 flight mission on which the crew included Alan Bean.

gold_outputs: Alan Bean was a member of the NASA operated Apollo 12 crew commanded by David Scott.
Alan Bean was under commander David Scott on Nasa's Apollo 12 mission.
David Scott was the commander of the NASA operated Apollo 12 flight mission on which the crew included Alan Bean.
